{{Quote|The walker design for the All-Terrain Tactical Enforcer is relatively new but sure to grow more popular|AT-TE Walker 71E flavour text|<ref name="TCG">{{TCG|set=Attack of the Clones|cardname=AT-TE Walker 71E|link=https://swtcg.com/Content/Images/Cards/AOTC/AT_TE_Walker_71E.webp?v=2}}</ref>}}
'''71E''' was the designation of an [[All Terrain Tactical Enforcer/Legends|All Terrain Tactical Enforcer]] produced by [[Rothana Heavy Engineering/Legends|Rothana Heavy Engineering]] and deployed by the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of]] [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 2002-04-23 -->{{TCG|set=Attack of the Clones|cardname=AT-TE Walker 71E|link=https://swtcg.com/Content/Images/Cards/AOTC/AT_TE_Walker_71E.webp?v=2}}
